reasoning: I chose early diabetes screening because this patient has multiple risk factors such as previous large babies, obesity and a strong family history of diabetes. Testing now can catch diabetes early and prevent problems for her and the baby.

highlights.text: History of delivering a macrosomic infant (>4000 g)
Pre-pregnancy BMI of 38 kg/m² (Class II Obesity) is a major independent risk factor for both gestational diabetes and pre-existing type 2 diabetes.
Both parents have type 2 diabetes mellitus, indicating a strong genetic predisposition.

Her history of delivering two macrosomic infants, particularly the second LGA infant at 37 weeks, is a near pathognomonic sign of underlying glucose intolerance in previous pregnancies.
